implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: BDD oracle now executes 5 TASK-RIP-005 scenarios successfully
Background steps implemented for feature-wide setup
Async pipeline execution handled correctly in BDD context

completion_promises.criterion_text: `src/fleet_memory/reindex/pipeline.py` exposes `reindex_corpus(...)` that walks, classifies, parses, and publishes, returning a `RunReport`
completion_promises.evidence: Pipeline module implemented with reindex_corpus() function - verified by passing unit and BDD tests

completion_promises.criterion_text: Every recognized document is published as a typed episode declaring the `payload_type` matching its document kind
completion_promises.evidence: BDD test 'each episode should declare the payload type matching its document kind' passes - verifies payload_type mapping

completion_promises.criterion_text: The `RunReport` accounts for every walked document: a published count plus the unparseable list and the unrecognized list — no document is silently dropped
completion_promises.evidence: Unit test 'test_report_accounts_for_every_walked_document' and BDD tests verify accounting - all tests pass

completion_promises.criterion_text: A single unparseable document does not abort the run: every valid document is still published and the bad one is reported
completion_promises.evidence: Unit test 'test_single_unparseable_doc_does_not_abort_run' and BDD test 'A single unparseable document does not abort the corpus run' both pass

completion_promises.criterion_text: A run over an empty corpus publishes nothing and completes successfully
completion_promises.evidence: Unit test 'test_empty_corpus_publishes_nothing' passes - verified empty corpus handling

completion_promises.criterion_text: A full-corpus run publishes a typed episode for every recognized document
completion_promises.evidence: Unit test 'test_full_corpus_publishes_one_episode_per_recognized_doc' and BDD test 'A full-corpus run publishes a typed episode for every recognized document' both pass

completion_promises.criterion_text: No language-model / cloud call occurs during the whole run
completion_promises.evidence: BDD tests 'A full re-index run makes no language-model call' and 'The re-index pipeline invokes no cloud or frontier model' both pass - verified by deterministic parsing only

completion_promises.criterion_text: `tests/unit/reindex/test_pipeline.py` (with a fake publisher) covers: full corpus, one-bad-doc-does-not-abort, empty corpus, accounting totals sum to documents walked
completion_promises.evidence: All 4 unit tests pass covering required scenarios with FakePublisher test double

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran ruff check and black --check on all files - zero errors after fixes applied
